function.name: config_dci_pdu
function.signature: static void config_dci_pdu(NR_UE_MAC_INST_t *mac, fapi_nr_dl_config_request_t *dl_config, const int rnti_type, const int slot, const NR_SearchSpace_t *ss)

bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function config_dci_pdu in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE/nr_ue_dci_configuration.c:104.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
